resources.name: node-graphql-api
resources.description: GraphQL API with Apollo Server — queries, mutations, subscriptions

body.text: {"query": "{ projects { id name status tasks { id title status assignee { name } } } }"}
{"query": "query GetUser($id: ID!) { user(id: $id) { id name email role projects { name } } }", "variables": {"id": "u1"}}
{"query": "mutation CreateProject($input: CreateProjectInput!) { createProject(input: $input) { id name status } }", "variables": {"input": {"name": "New Project", "teamId": "team1"}}}

{"query": "mutation Login($email: String!, $password: String!, $tenantSlug: String!) { login(email: $email, password: $password, tenantSlug: $tenantSlug) { accessToken refreshToken user { id name email role } } }", "variables": {"email": "alice@acme.com", "password": "password123", "tenantSlug": "acme"}}
